tasks.name: Apply brand col spacing fixes (REQ-01 + REQ-02)
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -q '<div class="space-y-6">' index.html && grep -q '<div class="pt-2">' index.html && grep -q 'mb-3">Sản phẩm của' index.html && ! grep -q '<div class="space-y-5">' index.html && ! grep -q 'mb-2">Sản phẩm của' index.html && echo 'T-01 PASS'

tasks.name: Apply 'Về chúng tôi' divider balance (REQ-03)
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -q 'pt-5 border-t border-white/10' index.html && ! grep -q 'pt-1 border-t border-white/10' index.html && ! sed -n '/<!-- About us -->/,/<\/div>/p' index.html | grep -q 'mt-4' && echo 'T-02 PASS'

tasks.name: Apply copyright bottom bar breathing room (REQ-04)
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -q 'border-t border-white/10 mt-16 pt-8 text-center' index.html && ! grep -q 'mt-12 pt-6 text-center' index.html && echo 'T-03 PASS'
